doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The document outlines a legal framework that would fundamentally violate the California Business and Professions Code regarding the unauthorized practice of law, and no such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in State Bar of California records.
